description_long: This stereo sound system consists of two rectangular speakers with a modern, minimalist design. The enclosures are finished in a light wood texture, giving them a warm and natural appearance. The front panels of the speakers are contrasting: one is black and the other is white, each featuring two circular speaker drivers and a small blue indicator light. The right speaker includes a control knob and a small button, suggesting integrated volume and power controls. The rear panels are plain, with subtle branding and no visible ports or connectors. The overall build appears sturdy, with smooth edges and a clean, professional finish.
description: A pair of modern, wood-finished stereo speakers with black and white front panels, visible speaker drivers, and integrated controls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the light wood texture and the rectangular profile of the speakers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the black and white panels, speaker drivers, blue indicator lights, and control knob on the right speaker.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again highlighting the wood finish and the depth of the enclosures.
description_view_3: Rear view showing plain back panels with subtle branding and no visible ports or connectors.
attribute_brand_logo: Small, subtle logo with the text 'aosbou' on the lower front of each speaker.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Circular, recessed speaker grilles with a smooth, matte finish and no visible mesh or perforation pattern.
attribute_control_panel_layout: One rotary knob and one small button located on the lower right front panel, with minimal labeling.
